SEARCH
Package simulator.core

Class MemoryManager

java.lang.Object
simulator.core.MemoryManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
MemoryReplacementStrategy
public class MemoryManager extends Object implements MemoryReplacementStrategy
Manages the system RAM memory and manually implements the LRU (Least Recently Used) page replacement policy without using Java libraries. It also keeps track of the time required to load a process from disk into RAM.

  • Constructor Details

    • MemoryManager

      public MemoryManager(int totalRam, double diskTransferRate)
      Constructs the memory manager.
      Parameters:
      totalRam - Maximum physical memory.
      diskTransferRate - Memory copy speed per tick.

  • Method Details

    • isProcessInRam

      public boolean isProcessInRam(Process p)
      Checks whether a process is already fully loaded into RAM.
      Parameters:
      p - The process being searched.
      Returns:
      true if the process is in RAM, false otherwise.

    • markAsRecentlyUsed

      public void markAsRecentlyUsed(Process p)
      Marks a process as "Most Recently Used". This moves it to the end of the array, protecting it from being swapped out (LRU policy). This method should be called by the Scheduler whenever the process receives CPU time.
      Specified by:
      markAsRecentlyUsed in interface MemoryReplacementStrategy
      Parameters:
      p - The process that was just accessed/executed.

    • startLoadingProcessToRam

      public void startLoadingProcessToRam(Process p, int globalTime, SimulationEngine engine)
      Starts loading a process from Disk into RAM. If RAM is full, LRU eviction is performed first.

    • evictLeastRecentlyUsed

      public void evictLeastRecentlyUsed(int globalTime, SimulationEngine engine)
      Description copied from interface: MemoryReplacementStrategy
      Elimina din memorie procesul cel mai putin utilizat pentru a face loc.
      Specified by:
      evictLeastRecentlyUsed in interface MemoryReplacementStrategy

    • executeSwapTick

      public Process executeSwapTick()
      Executes one unit of time for the disk transfer. If the transfer finishes, the process is physically added to RAM.
      Returns:
      The process that has just finished loading, or null if loading is still in progress / nothing is loading.

    • isSwapping

      public boolean isSwapping()
      Checks whether a Disk -> RAM transfer is currently in progress.

    • getSwappingProcess

      public Process getSwappingProcess()
      Returns the process currently being loaded from Disk.
